title: Navaris Over The Door Hanger Hooks - Over-Door Coat Rack with 6 Knobs for Doors with Flat Top up to 4cm Thick - Stainless Steel - Gold
features: DOOR HANGER: Hang coats, clothes, bags or towels from the back of a door using this stainless steel hanger with 6 sturdy knobs. The hanger's design allows the door to be opened and closed normally, making it ideal for use throughout your home.

ATTACH EASILY: The door hanger is simple to attach and remove without drilling or complicated assembly. This makes it easy to install wherever it is needed in your home, and to move to a new location whenever you like.
SPECS: The item measures 39 x 11 x 4.5 cm (15.35 x 4.33 x 1.77 inches). The hanger is suitable for doors up to 4 cm thick. It is only suitable for doors that are flat at the top!

DURABLE & STABLE: Made from robust stainless steel, the door rack is sturdy and stable for long-lasting use. This makes it great for storing clothes, coats and bags in a bedroom or hallway, or for hanging towels and dressing gowns in a bathroom.
SOFT PADDING: The underside of the hanger features soft padding to prevent damage to your door.
description: Transform the back of a door into a storage space ideal for hanging coats, clothes and bags, as well as towels and dressing gowns, with this stylish and practical hanger. 6 STURDY KNOBS The hanger features six robust knobs with a rim at the end to prevent items from sliding off. This allows an often neglected space behind a door to be repurposed as a useful storage solution. STRONG & STURDY The door hanger is made from stainless steel for long-lasting strength and stability. The underside of the hanger features soft padding to prevent damage to your door. PLEASE NOTE The hanger is suitable for doors up to 4 cm thick. Only suitable for doors that are flat at the top - please check your door! PROTECTIVE PADDING Soft padding on the underside of the hanger prevents damage to your door. The hanger won't affect the door's action, so it can still be opened and closed as normal. SPECIFICATIONS Measurements: 39 cm x 11 cm x 4.5 cm (15.35" x 4.33" x 1.77"). Materials: stainless steel For doors up to 4 cm thick Only suitable for doors that are flat at the top! Weight: 290 g SCOPE OF DELIVERY 1 x Stainless steel door hanger - Gold
